% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

1. popular(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
2. is_on_platform(stranger_things,netflix) [input(axiom)]

8. shares_with(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~shares_with(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [negated conjecture 8]
10. ~shares_with(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [flattening 9]
11. ! [X0] : (binge_watches(karen,X0) | (~is_on_platform(X0,netflix) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 4]
12. ! [X0] : (binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~is_on_platform(X0,netflix) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 11]
13. ! [X0] : (shares_with(karen,X0,lisa) | (~is_on_platform(X0,netflix) | ~binge_watches(karen,X0))) [ennf transformation 7]
14. ! [X0] : (shares_with(karen,X0,lisa) | ~is_on_platform(X0,netflix) | ~binge_watches(karen,X0)) [flattening 13]
16. popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
17. is_on_platform(stranger_things,netflix) [cnf transformation 2]
19. ~is_on_platform(X0,netflix) | binge_watches(karen,X0) | ~popular(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
23. shares_with(karen,X0,lisa) | ~is_on_platform(X0,netflix) | ~binge_watches(karen,X0) [cnf transformation 14]
24. ~shares_with(karen,stranger_things,lisa) [cnf transformation 10]
25. binge_watches(karen,stranger_things) | ~popular(stranger_things) [resolution 19,17]
36. binge_watches(karen,stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 25,16]
37. ~is_on_platform(stranger_things,netflix) | ~binge_watches(karen,stranger_things) [resolution 23,24]
38. ~binge_watches(karen,stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 37,17]
39. $false [forward subsumption resolution 38,36]
% SZS output end Proof for stranger_things_positive
% Termination reason: Refutation
